scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev -w apps/backend" "npm run dev -w apps/frontend"
scripts.build: npm run build -w shared && npm run build -w backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w shared && npm run typecheck -w backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
scripts.test: npm run build -w shared && npm run test -w backend && npm run test -w frontend && npm run test:scripts
scripts.ci: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build
